title: Ynys Uchaf
summary: Ynys Uchaf is a section of floodplain of the River Gwendraeth that is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
text: Ynys Uchaf is a section of floodplain of the River Gwendraeth that is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
